public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as grain measurer.
manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a grain measurer still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of grain measurer in and around Whitebridge Commune, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Whitebridge Commune workable through the obligations of grain measurer while managing the immediate pressure of bridge icing in Sheresh Communes.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Whitebridge Commune, that usually means carrying bridge icing, refugee surges, missing expeditions without letting the role of grain measurer visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Thora Snowveil can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Thora Snowveil can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Thora Snowveil carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia. In Whitebridge Commune, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Route Warden Compacts, Loss Ledger Circles.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Whitebridge Commune: the part of Whitebridge Commune where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
